steps.purpose: Customer opens the published Abdi Restaurant website and decides whether to contact the restaurant.
steps.title: Abdi Restaurant
steps.visibleText: Abdi Restaurant Home About Menu Contact Request quote ★ TRUSTED QUALITY Neuchâtel's Table of Choice Abdi Restaurant is where exceptional food meets an atmosphere worth remembering. Whether you're celebrating a milestone or simply enjoying an evening out, your seat is waiting. Reserve yours tonight. Book now MENU Dishes Crafted With Intention Every plate at Abdi begins with fresh, carefully sourced ingredients — and ends with something that stays with you. From refined starters to indulgent mains, our menu is built around one idea: food that genuinely delights. Explore the full menu and find your next favourite dish. steps.purpose: Staff reviews possible duplicate customer records.
steps.visibleText: M Marketing AI OVERVIEW Home CONTENT Social posts Landing pages Forms CRM Contacts Deals Segments Inbox Duplicates AUTOMATION Email templates Email settings Sequences SMS automation CHANNELS Integrations ACCOUNT Account Brand Domains Billing Settings EN DE FR IT Log out ← Back to contacts Duplicate contacts We found possible duplicates. Pick the "primary" contact in each group — the others will be merged into it, preserving tags, leads, notes, and history. Duplicates happen when the same customer submits more than one form or uses different contact details. Review carefully before merging so the customer history stays clean. SAME PHONE NUMBER+41791234567 2 contacts sophie.martin@test.ch PRIM
